title: OverrideRecord
description: A human-in-the-loop override of an engine decision, with an optional calibration note. Append-only; the raw material for brand taste memory.

id.description: Stable unique id for this override record.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the override was recorded.

source.description: Path or reference to the audit input the override applies to.

human_decision.description: The decision the human recorded instead.

override_reason.description: Why the human overrode the engine.

calibration_note.description: Optional guidance to steer future scoring for this class of asset.
